About Digital Factory

Practical resources for the modern digital creator.

Digital Factory is a content hub and digital product store for creators, freelancers, and entrepreneurs who want to work smarter. Every day, we publish a new article that covers AI prompts, productivity systems, freelance strategy, and side-hustle tactics — all grounded in real workflows, not theory.

Each article is paired with a downloadable resource available on Gumroad: prompt packs, Notion templates, swipe files, checklists, and frameworks. Our philosophy is simple — if a tool or technique saves you an hour, it's worth publishing. If a resource can do that at scale, it's worth selling.

What we cover

  • ChatGPT & AI tools — battle-tested prompt packs and workflows
  • Freelance business — client acquisition, pricing, and proposals
  • Productivity systems — Notion setups, time-blocking, async work
  • Digital products — how to create, launch, and sell them
  • Writing & content — faster writing systems for bloggers and marketers

How we work

Every article follows the same battle-tested format: a real problem, a clear solution, and a step-by-step breakdown you can act on today. No padding, no vague advice — just the specific tactics, prompts, and frameworks that move the needle. And because we publish daily, there's always something fresh waiting for you.

The products

Every post links to a Gumroad product that expands on the topic. We focus on high-value, low-cost impulse buys — the kind of resource that pays for itself with a single use. No fluff, no filler. Just tools that work.

Stay in the loop

Subscribe to our RSS feed to get new articles as soon as they're published, or browse by all articles to find a topic that helps you right now.
